# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: '')
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_SERVER_IP', defaultValue: '', description: '')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Checkout') {
            steps {
                // Your source code checkout steps here, e.g., git SCM step
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                sh "curl -LJO ${params.ARTIFACT_URL} -o artifact.zip"
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy Artifacts') {
            agent any
            steps {
                withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: 'deployment-key', usernameVariable: 'USERNAME')]) {
                    sshagent (credentials: ['deployment-key']) {
                        script {
                            def remoteUser = "root" // Or any other user with sufficient permissions
                            def serverIp = params.DEPLOYMENT_SERVER_IP
                            scp root@"${serverIp}":artifact.zip /path/to/destination/on/production/server
                            sshpassthru "ssh-copy-id -i ${env.SSH_AUTH_SOCK} ${remoteUser}@${serverIp}"
                            sshpass(pwd: 'your-password', sshCommand: '/usr/bin/ssh-agent -s') {
                                sshpass (configName:'sshConfig', sshCommand:"ssh") {
                                    sshroot@"${serverIp}" "tar xzvf /path/to/destination/on/production/server/artifact.zip -C /path/to/deploy/"
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
